foxy.config.title: Foxy
foxy.config.general.serviceThreads.toolt: Number of threads Foxy's service thread pool may use.
foxy.config.general.useSodiumBuilder.too: Borrow Embeddium's chunk builder threads as part of Foxy's thread pool. Can reduce stuttering when moving quickly at high render distance.
foxy.config.general.ingest.tooltip: Enables or disables Foxy's ability to convert loaded chunks into LODs.
foxy.config.general.logging.tooltip: Enables or disables all of Foxy's log output (info, warnings and errors), including the in-game error popup. Turn off to fully silence Foxy.
foxy.config.general.subDivisionSize.tool: Maximum screen-space AABB size in pixels² before subdividing into smaller LODs. Smaller = higher quality.
foxy.config.general.environmental_fog.to: Enables or disables Foxy's environmental fog. Disabled while an Iris shader pack is active.
foxy.config.general.ssao_mode.tooltip: Mode used for screen-space ambient occlusion. Auto picks the best option while limiting the performance impact. Disabled while an Iris shader pack is active.
foxy.config.general.debug_hud.tooltip: Shows Foxy's version, instance and renderer diagnostics on the F3 debug screen.
foxy.config.general.render_statistics.to: Collects per-LOD render statistics (hierarchical traversal / render-section / visible-section / quad counts) and per-pass GPU timing and shows them on the F3 debug overlay (needs the debug overlay enabled). Has a performance cost and recompiles the LOD shaders, so it is off by default.
